coverage: All five authored input sweeps execute with exact vertex and face counts and local bounds within 0.0001 units of Blender.
validation: Split Edges processes mesh components inside instances, matching Blender autosmooth topology. Curve Tangent now consumes Resample Curve's evaluated normalized-segment-bisector frame instead of rebuilding a length-weighted chord; the 39 pre-twist instance transforms match Blender within 0.000086 units.

groups.surface: anisotropic rough-metal mace ball and polished chain

materialParity.evidence: The exact soup contains an 18,620-triangle chrome.002 range and a 206,528-triangle null range. Blender's realized mesh has slots [chrome.002, null], assigns all 214,718 faces to slot zero, and carries rough=2 on the 9,310 mace faces while the joined chain resolves it to zero. The browser restores the equivalent per-vertex shader input from the exact material ranges. The source object's grainy test slot is not used by the generated surface. Authored/diagnostic preview switching is exposed in the Chrome Assets page.
